list_view.face_saved_hint: Perfect — next, upload your first piece of clothing below.
list_view.face_prompt_desc: We need you in a photo so Try-On can visualize clothing on you. The image stays local and is only used for your own generations.
list_view.face_upload_hint: Head + shoulders, neutral lighting if possible

grid_view.upload_hint: Front-on photo, bright background — better Try-On results
grid_view.empty_hint: Drag a photo into the zone above — or click it to pick one.
grid_view.space_footer: This wardrobe belongs to {name} — uploads only land here, not in your personal wardrobe.

outfits_view.title: Outfits
outfits_view.empty_no_garments: First add a few pieces of clothing in the "Clothing" tab — then you can combine them into outfits here.
outfits_view.empty_with_garments: Combine your clothing pieces into looks that you can then try on yourself with AI.

detail_garment.not_found_desc: The garment was deleted or belongs to another space.
detail_garment.action_comic_title: Generate a comic character from this garment

detail_outfit.action_comic_title: Generate a comic character from this outfit
detail_outfit.composition_missing: Referenced garments were removed or belong to another space.

garment_form.placeholder_name: e.g. Blue and white striped shirt

composer.empty_hint_prefix: First upload a few garments in the
composer.composition_empty: Click garments on the left to add them to the outfit.

try_on_garment.no_photo: Upload a photo first to visualize this piece on yourself.
try_on_garment.refs_title: We need you in a photo for solo try-on.
try_on_garment.refs_accessory: A face photo is enough — the piece is mounted onto it.
try_on_garment.refs_full: A face and a full-body photo. Both are only used for your own generations.
try_on_garment.face_hint: Head + shoulders, neutral lighting if possible
try_on_garment.body_hint: Standing, free background, posture clearly visible
try_on_garment.refs_more_prefix: More references or per-image AI opt-ins:
try_on_garment.accessory_hint: Accessory mode — only the face is rendered (saves credits).
try_on_garment.space_hint_prefix: Try-On uses your reference images from this space

try_on_outfit.refs_title: We need you in a photo for try-on.
try_on_outfit.refs_accessory: A face photo is enough — the rest stays as in your photo.
try_on_outfit.refs_full: A face and a full-body photo. Both are only used for your own generations.
try_on_outfit.face_hint: Head + shoulders, neutral lighting if possible
try_on_outfit.body_hint: Standing, free background, posture clearly visible
try_on_outfit.refs_more_prefix: More references or per-image AI opt-ins:
try_on_outfit.accessory_hint: Accessory mode — only the face is rendered (saves credits).
try_on_outfit.many_garments_hint: With {count} garments the reference slot is tight — older items may not be carried over.
try_on_outfit.space_hint_prefix: Try-On uses your reference images from this space
try_on_outfit.family_hint: Kids' outfits are still rendered onto your face.
try_on_outfit.empty_garments: Add at least one {category} to enable Try-On.
